title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell shares data on the rapid shift in software engineering toward AI-driven and autonomous agent development. Enterprise AI-generated code rose from 15% to 75% in a year, with 30% of Cursor PRs now fully agent-developed end-to-end. Engineers are transitioning to managing autonomous agent teams rather than writing code manually.
